description: Settings contract workflow target used by ACT-093 and future platform-by-platform evidence runs.

billing page renders generic plan and up.expected: Billing Settings renders plan, storage, and upgrade surfaces without exposing AI Boost purchase copy.

settings tab navigation reaches billing.expected: Settings tab navigation reaches API Keys and Billing on web, with active tab and URL matching the selected surface.

API keys page masks existing keys and ex.expected: Web API Keys masks raw existing keys, exposes Create API Key, validates description before enabling submit, and cancels without creating a key.
